---
title: "gbr4-bgc4p2-baseline_chl-a-sum_din_tss"
format:
  html:
    template: ../../../../../custom_template.html
params:
  product-name: Total chlorophyll, dissolved inorganic nitrogen & total suspended solids (GBR4 BGC v4.2 baseline)
  block-name: gbr4-bgc4p2-baseline_chl-a-sum_din_tss
  product-id: products__ncanimate__ereefs__gbr4_bgc4p2_baseline__chl-a-sum_din_tss
---

{{< include ../../../../../includes/_visualisation.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../../../includes/_bgc4c4_missing_data_notice.qmd >}}

### Total Chlorophyll

Sum of chlorophyll concentration of the four microalgae types (small,
large, microphytobenthos, trichodesmium).

### Dissolved inorganic nitrogen

Concentration of dissolved inorganic nitrogen (DIN). DIN = \[NH~4~\] +
\[NO~3~\].

### Total suspended solids

This is the sum of the suspended sediments in the water column. It is
\[Fine sediment\] + \[Mud\] + \[Mud carbonate\] + \[Mud mineral\] +
\[Dust\]

{{< include ../../../../../includes/_source_data_bgc_v4p2.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../../../includes/_data_span.qmd >}}
